prompt: Ultra-cinematic studio sports portrait against a pure black seamless background, subject facing the camera with a calm, confident expression, wearing a modern football jersey, arms folded across the chest. Dramatic dual-color cinematic lighting: cool cyan key light from camera left and warm amber rim light from camera right, creating striking color contrast and sculpted facial features. Long-exposure motion effect captures two translucent ghosted profiles trailing behind the subject as the head rotates naturally from front-facing to profile, while the main face remains razor-sharp. Smooth motion blur with realistic optical streaking, no duplicated body, only layered head movement. High-end editorial sports photography, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, f/2, crisp skin texture, detailed eyes with natural catchlights, subtle sweat, photorealistic fabric texture, premium commercial lighting, rich contrast, clean composition, minimalist aesthetic, dramatic mood, HDR, 8K, hyper-realistic, no CGI, no illustration, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Ultra-cinematic studio sports portrait against a pure black seamless background, subject facing the camera with a calm, confident expression, wearing a modern football jersey, arms folded across the chest. Dramatic dual-color cinematic lighting: cool cyan key light from camera left and warm amber rim light from camera right, creating striking color contrast and sculpted facial features. Long-exposure motion effect captures two translucent ghosted profiles trailing behind the subject as the head rotates naturally from front-facing to profile, while the main face remains razor-sharp. promptZh: 超电影感工作室运动肖像，背景为纯黑色无缝幕布，主体面向镜头，表情冷静自信，身穿 现代足球球衣，双臂交叉于胸前。戏剧性的 双色电影级布光：相机左侧为冷青色主光，相机右侧为暖琥珀色轮廓光，营造出强烈的色彩对比和立体的面部轮廓。长曝光动态效果捕捉到主体头部从正面转向侧面时留下的两道半透明重影，同时主体面部保持极其清晰。平滑的动态模糊伴随逼真的光学拖影，无重复身体，仅有分层的头部运动。高端编辑类运动摄影，浅景深，85mm 镜头，f/2，清晰的皮肤纹理，带有自然眼神光的细节双眼，细微汗珠，照片级织物纹理，高级商业布光，丰富的对比度，简洁的构图，极简主义美学，戏剧性氛围，HDR，8K，超写实，无 CGI，无插画，无文字，无水印。
